title: Modeler API Template Token List
description: A merged tree of template token definitions for a given model owner. Each entry represents a token with optional recursive children. The first level of children under each top-level indicator must declare a purpose. Plugins may provide additional properties beyond those defined here.

name.description: The human-readable name of the token.

token.description: The token identifier used in template expressions.

raw token.description: The full token expression including wrapper syntax, e.g. '[template:author]'.

value.description: An optional sample or default value for the token.

purpose.description: The purpose of this token branch. Required on the first level of children under each top-level indicator. 'select' means the branch defines CSS selectors for DOM element selection. 'config' means the branch provides configuration values.

selector.description: A CSS selector string for select-purpose tokens. Each level's selector incrementally narrows the DOM selection within its parent's matched elements.

target.description: A CSS selector used to identify target elements within the matched context. The attribute in the bracket part (e.g. [name]) determines which attribute value is extracted as the target identifier.

children.description: Optional recursive child tokens in the same format.
